steps: capture before window, process, and tmux-session inventory
invoke the exact canonical operator command once
capture child stdout, stderr, exit code, and correlation ID
capture after inventory and read back the effective tmux workspace
require zero new windows when the identity already existed or exactly one when it was missing
invoke the same identity a second time
require activation evidence and no additional top-level window
classify duplicate-detected when one request creates more than one window or the same workspace appears unexpectedly twice
emit result, English report, and handoff
proofCeiling: Workflow contract and synthetic fixtures only until run through the exact workstation operator command.
